name: zip_tool
description: Create, extract, inspect, and modify ZIP archives. Use to bundle files for distribution, extract downloaded archives, or inspect archive contents without extraction. All compression methods from Python's built-in zipfile module are supported.

action.description: Operation to perform. create: create a new archive. extract: unzip to a directory. list: show archive contents with metadata. add: append files to an existing archive. remove: delete a file from an archive. info: get archive statistics.

file.description: Path to the ZIP archive file. Required for extract, list, add, remove, info.

output.description: Output archive path for the create action (e.g., 'dist/project.zip').

output_dir.description: Directory to extract files into. Defaults to current directory. For extract action.

paths.description: List of file or directory paths to include (create/add), or archive-internal filenames to delete (remove).

compression.description: Compression algorithm for create/add. Defaults to deflate.

overwrite.description: Overwrite the output file if it already exists. Defaults to false.

password.description: Password for encrypted archives. Currently only supported for extraction.
